text.text: قال جابر رضي الله عنه :  كنا إذا صعدنا كبرنا ، وإذا نزلنا سبحنا
text.transliteration: Q'l j'br rdy 'llh 'nh : kn' 'idh' s'dn' kbrn' w'idh' nzln' sbhn
text.translation: Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) said: "Whenever we ascended (a hill), we would say Allāhu Akbar, and whenever we descended, we would say SubḥānAllāh."

translations.en: Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) said: "Whenever we ascended (a hill), we would say Allāhu Akbar, and whenever we descended, we would say SubḥānAllāh."
translations.bn: জাবির (রাঃ) বলেছেন: "আমরা যখন উপরে উঠতাম তখন তাকবীর বলতাম (আল্লাহু আকবার), আর যখন নিচে নামতাম তখন তাসবীহ পড়তাম (সুবহানাল্লাহ)।"
translations.id: Jabir radhiyallahu 'anhu berkata: "Kami biasa bertakbir (mengucapkan Allahu Akbar) ketika mendaki, dan bertasbih (mengucapkan SubhanAllah) ketika menuruni."
translations.tr: Câbir (radıyallahu anh) şöyle dedi: "Yokuş çıktığımızda tekbir getirirdik (Allahu Ekber), indiğimizde ise tesbih ederdik (Subhânallah)."
translations.ur: جابر رضی اللہ عنہ نے فرمایا: "جب ہم بلندی پر چڑھتے تو تکبیر کہتے (اللہ اکبر) اور جب نیچے اترتے تو تسبیح پڑھتے (سبحان اللہ)۔"
